name: Golcap Resources Corp.
summary: Golcap Resources Corp, a mineral exploration company, engages in the identification, acquisition, and exploration of mineral properties in British Columbia. The company primarily explores for copper, gold, and other metals. It holds interests in the Tulameen Project that consists of two mineral claims covering an area of 1738.29 hectares located in the Otter Lake in southern, British Columbia. Golcap Resources Corp was founded in 2019 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
